text:
Soul of the Guardian is the 20th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

The two vicious guardians of Laboratory Five attack Ed and Al, and the confrontation forces the brothers to ponder difficult questions about life that could lead to disturbing answers.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 11: The Two Guardians and Chapter 12: The Definition of Human.

See also
